summary: SQLite migration: v3_006_concept_families.sql creates concept_families, concept_family_membership (with is_primary CHECK + partial unique index + parent_id index + reverse-lookup index), concept_aliases, family_aliases (both with CHECK(alias=LOWER(alias)) and ON DELETE CASCADE). Per design.md §5.

resolution.note: v3_006_concept_families.sql: 4 tables + 5 indexes per design.md §5, purely additive & idempotent. Mirrored into scripts/schema.sql. Verified via 13 unit tests + real-schema CLI apply (foreign_key_check empty, integrity ok, idempotent re-run).
